name: Lober Lobe
short_description: Shoot psychic orbs, collect useful thoughts, upgrade your Probe with speed, maneuverability, satellites, resistance and suppress negative thoughts in this Brain centric, procedurally generated bullet hell shoot 'em up.
detailed_description:
Defeat Bosses

Organize & clear dangerous neuronal protein buildup to maintain play run

Suppress and Combat swarms of enemies

Unlock all 12 unique playable brains with different stats, gameplay feel and shooting abilities
 in this action packed, insane, brain centric, shoot 'em up.

_______________________________________________
Shoot psychic orbs, collect useful thoughts, upgrade your Probe with speed, maneuverability, satellites, resistance and suppress negative thoughts in this Brain centric, procedurally generated bullet hell shoot 'em up.
_______________________________________________

12 UNIQUE PLAYABLE PROBES
Consisting of:

2 starter Probes

10 unlockable Probes *strictly unlocked through gameplay

All with their own Shooting Attacks and Movement / Maneuverability Stats
____________________

6 STAGE ENVIRONMENTS

Each with their own tailored environmental threats and specified Boss
But also with Randomized enemies and terrain during every playthrough
____________________

CONTINUOUS MARATHON MODE

Select from 6 Stages and see how long you can last in the point-based endless wave based exponential progression run.

Clear wave after wave. Go faster and faster.
________________

PROBE CAMPAIGN MODE

Play through each stage one after the other and defeat the boss at the end of each stage in a classic type campaign mode.
_________________

Difficulty Settings:

Easy Mode - Basic, manageable speed, minimal threats

Normal Mode - Challenging, balanced speed, more threats

Hard Mode -Difficult, High Speed, most threats
__________________

Groovy catchy tunes and old school inspired sound design.
___________________

***Plus a Bonus RETRO Graphic Style Mode that changes the look of the in-game stages and various sprites within the stages to give the game a whole new look.

*This game has KEYBOARD based controls that can be easily mapped to ANY Controller.  Automatically maps to any controller on any Steam based platform.
